signals.headline: Limited trader buzz on mispriced opportunities | NO | MED confidence**
signals.raw:
Limited trader buzz on mispriced opportunities | NO | MED confidence**

Results show high-volume markets like X predictions ($161.4M total) and tweet bets ($16.2M), with examples like 7% on "Nikita Bier out as Head of Product at X by June 30?" or 62% on Kinetiq price hitting $0.5 in 2026, but no X-specific posts calling these mispriced or predicting moves.[1][2][4] Absence of direct X trader data
